login.title: Resume command
login.subtitle: [authenticate to resume operation]
login.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
login.resetSentDesc: Check your email for a link to reset your password. If it doesn't appear within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
login.error.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized for sign-in. Contact support.
login.error.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.
login.error.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site to sign in.
login.error.noAccount: No account found for this email. Sign up first.
register.title: Provision account
register.subtitle: [create account to run your operation]
register.popupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site to sign up.
register.error.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.error.emailExists: An account already exists with this email
register.error.passwordWeak: Password too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
authRequired.title: AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED
authRequired.body: [you must be logged in to access this page]
pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.cleared: PIN cleared. Please set a new PIN in Settings.
locked.title: Your subscription has expired
locked.description: Your access to the OPS command center has been suspended. All your data is safe and will be available once you reactivate your subscription. Choose a plan below to restore full access.
locked.guarantee: All plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.
locked.differentAccount: Sign in with a different account
locked.subscribeFailed.title: Couldn't start checkout
locked.subscribeFailed.generic: Something went wrong on our side. Try again, or contact support if the problem continues.
locked.subscribeFailed.noCompany: Your account isn't tied to a company yet. Sign out and back in, then try again.
lockout.expiredAdmin.title: Your subscription has expired
lockout.expiredAdmin.body: Your team's access to OPS has been suspended. All data is safe. Reactivate your subscription to restore access.
lockout.expiredMember.title: Your subscription has expired
lockout.expiredMember.body: Your company's subscription is no longer active. Contact your administrator to restore access.
lockout.unseated.title: Your seat has been removed
lockout.unseated.body: You no longer have an active seat on your company's OPS plan. Contact your administrator to regain access.
lockout.unseatedAdmin.title: You don't have a seat assigned
lockout.unseatedAdmin.body: Your account doesn't have an active seat. Go to Team Management to assign yourself a seat and restore access.
lockout.differentAccount: Sign in with a different account
lockout.guarantee: All plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.
